ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code for the state (e.g., 01, 02) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lgas" (
  "lga_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local government area */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the LGA belongs to */,
  "lga_name" TEXT /* Name of the local government area */,
  "lga_code" TEXT /* Code for the LGA (e.g., 21, 22) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the LGA */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the LGA in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the LGA record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the LGA record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lgas_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "lga_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LGA the ward belongs to */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "ward_code" TEXT /* Code for the ward (e.g., 09, 10) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ward */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the ward in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ward record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ward record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_lga_id FOREIGN KEY ("lga_id") REFERENCES lgas ("lga_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_units" (
  "pu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling unit */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward the polling unit belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the polling unit */,
  "pu_code" TEXT /* Code for the polling unit (e.g., 10/21/09/016) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the polling unit */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the polling unit */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the polling unit */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of polling unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the polling unit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the polling unit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_units_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES polling_unit_types ("pu_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_units_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., Presidential, Gubernatorial) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, gubernatorial) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the election record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the election record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the result belongs to */,
  "pu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the polling unit the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the election at the polling unit */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast at the polling unit */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of valid votes */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_pu_id FOREIGN KEY ("pu_id") REFERENCES polling_units ("pu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result the document belongs to */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "has_old_documents" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if old documents exist */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., result sheet, audit report) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_documents_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, election official, observer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_unit_types" (
  "pu_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling unit type */,
  "pu_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling unit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the polling unit type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the polling unit type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the polling unit type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pu_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_unit_features" (
  "pu_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling unit feature */,
  "pu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the polling unit the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the polling unit feature record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the polling unit feature record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pu_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_unit_features_pu_id FOREIGN KEY ("pu_id") REFERENCES polling_units ("pu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ward_features" (
  "ward_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward feature */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ward feature record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ward feature record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ward_features_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lga_features" (
  "lga_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local government area feature */,
  "lga_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the local government area the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the LGA feature record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the LGA feature record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lga_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lga_features_lga_id FOREIGN KEY ("lga_id") REFERENCES lgas ("lga_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_features" (
  "state_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state feature */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state feature record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state feature record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_features_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
